testcase.name: TC-UI-CAT-A01 Verify that Admin can view the category list
TC-UI-CAT-A02 Verify that Admin can add a new main category with valid name
TC-UI-CAT-A03 Verify that Validation error when category name is empty
TC-UI-CAT-A04 Verify that Validation error when name is shorter than 3 characters
TC-UI-CAT-A05 Verify that Admin can delete a category - no confirmation dialog expected per SRS

failure.message: Unexpected confirmation dialog appeared after clicking Delete. SRS Section 5.1 does not document any confirmation prompt — this is an over-implementation (undocumented behaviour).

testcase.failure: Unexpected confirmation dialog appeared after clicking Delete. SRS Section 5.1 does not document any confirmation prompt — this is an over-implementation (undocumented behaviour).
testcase.system-err: Unexpected confirmation dialog appeared after clicking Delete. SRS Section 5.1 does not document any confirmation prompt — this is an over-implementation (undocumented behaviour). testcase.name: TC-UI-CAT-U01 Verify that User can view category list in read-only mode

failure.message: [Edit button should be hidden for normal User] Expecting value to be false but was true

testcase.failure: [Edit button should be hidden for normal User] Expecting value to be false but was true

testcase.name: TC-UI-CAT-U02 Verify that User can search categories by name
TC-UI-CAT-U03 Verify that User can filter categories by parent
TC-UI-CAT-U04 Verify that Cancel button returns user to category list
TC-UI-CAT-U05 Verify that User can sort category list by Name
